impact: Extends PP&D deterministic guardrail coverage to the demolition permit workflow, validating missing fact detection, document group requirements, and stop points for payment, correction upload, inspection scheduling, and finalization using committed redacted fixtures only.
summary: Add fixture-only demolition permit guardrail compiler tests.
target_task: Task checkbox-92: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the demolition permit workflow covering missing facts, required document groups, payment stop points, correction-upload stop points, and any inspection/finalization stop points, using only fixture data.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
